complaint: Sometimes when I press the start button nothing happens at all, no crank, totally dead, then a minute later it starts fine. It feels like the car is dying and I don't trust it anymore.
observations: No-crank condition resolves when key is jiggled or twisted slightly in the cylinder
Voltage drop measured across battery terminal clamps under cranking attempt
Negative terminal clamp shows green corrosion and is loose to the touch
provenance: Scenario: blind subagent (overcall-probe-v1, blind to held severity diff/anchors/existing cases). Severity+cost: Kai domain review 2026-06-13 (drive/don't-drive rule; sourced market cost). Diagnosis slug proposed from repair_target 'corroded battery cable terminal clamp replacement'.
